hero.title: Prompt Engineering
hero.subtitle: The Art of Conversing with AI
hero.desc: Maximizing professional productivity through structured and strategic interaction with Large Language Models.

definition.title: What is Prompt Engineering?
definition.desc_1: It's the systematic process of designing, refining, and optimizing the instructions (prompts) we give to Artificial Intelligence models to achieve specific, precise, and high-value results.
definition.desc_2: By mastering this technique, we transform generic and superficial outputs into precise, deep responses perfectly aligned with business objectives.

anatomy.title: Anatomy of a Perfect Prompt
anatomy.card_1_desc: The specific task we want the model to perform.
anatomy.card_2_desc: External information or guidelines to orient the response.
anatomy.card_3_desc: The content the model must process or transform.
anatomy.card_4_desc: The format, tone, or constraints of the final result.
anatomy.card_5_desc: What to avoid to prevent bias, vague answers, or hallucinations.

rtcf.title: RTCF Framework
rtcf.t_desc: The main action (e.g., Write an email).
rtcf.f_desc: How you want the response (e.g., In bullet points).
rtcf.pro_tip_desc: Context is the difference between a generic answer and a professional solution.

config.title: Configuration and Optimization
config.label: Creativity vs. Rigor Level:
config.hint_1: Think of it this way: An
config.hint_2: needs low temperature (0.1) to be exact; a
config.hint_3: needs high temperature (0.9) to be original.
config.box_1_desc: Limits the response size. More tokens mean higher cost and wait time.
config.box_2_desc: A concise prompt reduces token usage, saving money on every interaction.

techniques.t_0_desc: Direct instruction with no prior examples. Relies on the model's base reasoning.
techniques.t_1_desc: Provide examples to replicate complex patterns. Ideal for standardizing tone and format.
techniques.t_2_desc: Breaks down logical problems into sequential steps. Avoids immediate calculation errors.

safety.title: Safety & Governance
safety.desc_1: Additional critical risks that must be mitigated:
safety.a_0_d: Generation of offensive or policy-violating language.
safety.a_1_d: False claims presented as absolute facts.
safety.a_2_d: Malicious technique to bypass system constraints.
safety.a_3_d: Risk of exposing sensitive corporate data or PII.

best_practices.title: Best Practices
best_practices.p_0: Be clear and direct with instructions.
best_practices.p_4: Iterate and refine your prompts constantly.

audience.title: Who is this talk for?
audience.box_desc: Today, Prompt Engineering and Machine Learning are no longer exclusive tools for technical departments. AI is now horizontal.
audience.c_1_d: From People to Finance, we optimize workflows in our day-to-day.
audience.c_2_d: Anyone with an idea can enhance it through good prompt design.

thanks.title: Thank You
thanks.qa_desc: This is the perfect time to clarify doubts, explore use cases, or delve deeper into any presentation topic.
thanks.foot: Camilo A. Giraldo Ramirez — Senior Technical Consultant
